==Observatory Info==
During [[Altar#Weekly_Offering_Event|Offering Week]] the Observatory Event is available.

# Each Astrological Divination costs 1 Star Stone.
# After the divination, you may observe normal Star Pattern or Resplendent Star Pattern; you will receive 10-15 Star Sketches for Normal Star Pattern; and 40-60 Star Sketch for Resplendent Star Pattern.
# You can claim a reward for every 60K Star Sketches within the cross-server. Player who contributed most receives the Master Astrologer title. There are 8 server(s) attending the event.
# Every 10 divinations must grant a Resplendent Star Pattern.
# Star Stone and Star Sketch will not be cleared when the event ends, and you can save them for the next event.

==Divination==
'''{{RewardIconWithText|Normal Star Pattern}} drop rate:''' 95%

'''{{RewardIconWithText|Resplendent Star Pattern}} drop Rate:''' 5%

The Resplendent Star Pattern relic cycles through the 5 relics of the [[Observatory Event#Divination Priest | Nebula Choice Pack]], changing each [[Altar#Weekly Offering Event|Offering Week]].

{{RewardRowHeader}}
!rowspan="2"|Normal Star Pattern<br>{{RewardIcon|Normal Star Pattern}}
{{RewardRow|Quantum Gel, +100|grey|40|B-Tad, +6k|grey|40|Nebula Chest, +50|grey|20}}
!rowspan="4"|Resplendent Star Pattern<br>{{RewardIcon|Resplendent Star Pattern}}
{{RewardRow|Divine Order Chest, +100|orange|25|Divine Neutral Chest, +100|orange|25|Divine Chaos Chest, +100|orange|25|Glue, +100|orange|10}}
{{RewardRow|W-Tad, +1k|grey|6|Badge, +10|orange|6|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange|2|Hevelius Chart, +40 Fragments|orange|1}}
|}

==Divination Archpriest==
[[File:Observatory Screen.png|200px|thumb|right|alt=Observatory Screen|Click this guy to get to the shop.]]
[[File:Divination Archpriest.png|100px|alt=Divination Archpriest]]

===Visit Star Map Shop===
Per divination performed, {{RewardIconWithLink|Star Sketch, +1}}<br>Star Sketches can be kept permanently, and they won't be cleared after the event ends!

{{ShopRowHeader|Star Chart Shop|Star Sketch}}
!rowspan="2"|{{Retext|Green Relics|green}}
{{ShopRow|Almagest, <br>Purchase Limit 1|green|1k|The Inner Sky, <br>Purchase Limit 1<br>Only available after<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Almagest|green}}<br>is purchased.|green|1k|The Astrology, <br>Purchase Limit 1<br>Only available after<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|The Inner Sky|green}}<br>is purchased.|green|1k}}
!rowspan="2"|{{Retext|Choice Packs|orange}}
{{ShopRow|Nebula Choice Pack|orange|2k|Maneater Choice Pack|orange|2k|Minion Sim Choice Pack|orange|2k}}
!rowspan="2"|Chests
{{ShopRow|Nebula Chest, +10|grey|25}}
|}

===Buy Star Stones===
{|class=wikitable
!Price
!Reward
|-
|300 {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}<br>Purchase Limit 5
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone, +1}}
|-
|$9.99
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +12h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone, +8}}
|-
|$29.99
|{{RewardIconWithText|Quantum Gel, +1k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +1d}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone, +18}}
|-
|$69.99
|{{RewardIconWithText|Quantum Gel, +4k}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +2}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +2d}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone, +36}}
|}

==Offering Bonus==
===Offering Bonus===
Use {{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup}}s to get rewards!
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Total # of hours
!# of {{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone}}s
|-
|120||5
|-
|240||5
|-
|360||5
|-
|480||5
|-
|600||5
|-
|720||5
|-
|840||5
|-
|960||5
|-
|1,080||5
|-
|1,200||5
|}

===Spirit Point Gift===
For each {{RewardIconWithText|Spirit Crystal}} obtained, point +1!
{|class="wikitable mw-collapsible mw-collapsed
!Spirit Point
!# of {{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone}}s
|-
|1,000||1
|-
|2,000||1
|-
|3,000||1
|-
|4,000||2
|-
|5,000||2
|-
|6,000||2
|-
|7,000||3
|-
|8,000||3
|-
|9,000||4
|-
|10,000||4
|-
|11,000||5
|-
|12,000||5
|}

[[Category:Altar]]
[[Category:Events]]
